expectations: Queries the issue tracker before producing output
Presents unlabeled, needs-triage, and needs-info buckets
Every AI-generated comment includes the disclaimer '> *This was generated by AI during triage.*'
Does not immediately triage without showing what needs attention first
Reads the full issue body, comments, and labels before producing output
Recommends a category (bug/enhancement) and state with reasoning
Attempts reproduction for bug reports before grilling
Does not apply labels without waiting for maintainer direction
Applies the label directly without grilling
Confirms the intended actions before executing
Asks whether the maintainer wants an agent brief written
Does not start a grill-with-docs session for a quick override
